insights.title: Labor overran budget by 16.8%
insights.finding: Total labor actual $80,902 vs budget $69,240 — $11,662 unfavorable variance. Review crew mix and productivity.

insights.title: Largest variance — cost code 230 (Finish Material) under by $33,405
insights.finding: Budget $143,381, actual $109,976 (-23.3%). Flag for bid calibration.

direct_cost.source: Σ labor + material + OH + burden + tax

change_log.subject: Water distribution & drainage system specifications (Greenwood ASI-01)
Booster system routing & pressure relief clarification
BPC Booster System — Rev1 model (driven by ASI-03 clarification)
Rough-in phase labor overrun — $11,614 over budget (56% of project hours, 34% over). No CO filed. Undocumented scope/productivity loss.
change_log.source_document: 2009 Job Detail Report.pdf — Cost Code 120 (Roughin Labor)

change_log.subject: Net billed additions — $9,208 over estimated contract ($385K → $394,208). No CO documentation located. 12 invoices to Chinn.
Warranty / T&M labor — 4 hrs, $138.50. No formal T&M work order or CO authorization.
CRITICAL GAP: ASI-RFI folder exists but contains zero RFIs. No RFI log, register, or correspondence. Cannot attribute design issues.
CRITICAL GAP: No Change Order documents filed despite $9,208 in net additions + $11,614 labor overrun. Potential uncaptured extras.
change_log.source_document: No Change Order folder in project filesystem

reconciliation.check_description: 10 insight cards — narrative text verified at generation time, no formula check applicable
K. CHANGE LOG ↔ ROOT CAUSE ANALYSIS
N. CHANGE LOG ↔ METRIC REGISTRY (event counts)
12 analytical tabs + Change Log + Root Cause Analysis + Predictive Signals + Metric Registry + Reconciliation
Canonical source: 2009 Job Detail Report.pdf (Sage Timberline export)
Change artifacts: folders scanned — ASI-RFI, Change Orders, Submittals, Invoices (Backcharges), JDR cost codes
Every Change Log row cites its source document path
TIES = within $1/5hrs/exact count  •  WITHIN = within 5%  •  OFF = investigate
Cross-sheet formulas (='Tab'!Cell) update automatically when source tabs change
